phoneticUs: 藢semi藞pra瑟v蓹t; sema瑟藞pra瑟v蓹t
meaning: adj.(灏ゆ寚鍖婚櫌鐥呮埧)鍗婄鐢ㄧ殑,鍗婁笓鐢ㄧ殑
examples: You could make a semiprivate cubicle out of the screens, like the team leader had.
In the private, semiprivate, and nonprofit sectors, marquees tend to feature big donors and, increasingly, big corporations.
"I had a really good night out at Silencio, " she says, of a semiprivate club and lounge complex opened by film director David Lynch.
